text: The United Nations approved a new ceasefire resolution after urgent talks between regional leaders.
Diplomats from several countries met in Geneva to discuss border security and humanitarian aid.
The national team secured a dramatic comeback victory in the final minutes of the football match.
A star tennis player advanced to the semifinals after a straight sets win at the open tournament.
Shares of the retail company rose after executives reported stronger quarterly revenue and lower costs.
The central bank signaled that interest rates may remain steady as inflation slows this quarter.
Researchers unveiled a compact robot that can inspect damaged pipelines using onboard sensors.
The software update adds battery optimization, security patches, and improved cloud synchronization.
International observers warned that the peace agreement remains fragile despite the public ceremony.
The basketball coach praised the defense after the team held its rival to a season low score.
Investors reacted positively after the startup announced a partnership with a major payments firm.
Engineers tested a prototype chip designed to accelerate machine learning workloads on edge devices.
